TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Masilid, title = Masilid, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Masilid} }

S.FORM: alang Masilid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 334 buwan, 994 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 946 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 1%, Rukay 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Masilid hya' ga Wakaba. tay 'zil na Masilid hya' ga Zayazayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Masilid ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Maka go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 334 buwan, 994 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 946 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 48 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 90%, Amis 1%, Rukay 3%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Masilid hya' ga Wakaba. tay 'zil na Masilid hya' ga Zayazayan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mas~ɕili* ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu maka ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na mas~ɕili* ħjaʔ ɣa wakaβa. taj ʔzil na mas~ɕili* ħjaʔ ɣa zajazajan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
